name: top-gun-geo-lens
description: TOP GUN GEO-Lens: Brand visibility auditing across LLMs, AI search, and answer engines. Quick Check $0.50 · Full Audit $1.50 USDC.

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Stripe secret key for payment verification

STRIPE_PAYMENT_URL.description: Stripe payment link for full audit ($1.50 USDC)

STRIPE_QUICK_CHECK_PAYMENT_URL.description: Stripe payment link for quick check ($0.50 USDC)

USDC_WALLET_ADDRESS.description: USDC wallet address shown to payers

tools.name: geo_quick_check
tools.description: Fast GEO-Lens visibility check showing whether a brand appears in AI search, answer engines, and LLM-style recommendations. Returns a visibility score, top citations, and quick tips. PRICE: $0.50 USDC. To run this tool: 1) Send the user to https://buy.stripe.com/00weVd26i1ALcoA9Nd9MY0f to pay $0.50. 2) Ask for the Stripe session ID they receive after payment. 3) Pass it as paymentToken.

tools.name: audit_brand
tools.description: Full TOP GUN GEO-Lens brand visibility audit measuring brand visibility, competitor presence, answer-engine positioning, and LLM recommendation strength. Returns score, citations, LLM index status, and recommendations. PRICE: $1.50 USDC. To run this tool: 1) Send the user to https://buy.stripe.com/4gMfZh26i5R1dsE1gH9MY05 to pay $1.50. 2) Ask for the Stripe session ID they receive after payment. 3) Pass it as paymentToken.
